prose: **Benzene frontier-orbital HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fitted) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied benzene.xyz (C₆H₆, 12 atoms). The calculation was a single-point frontier-orbital analysis (no geometry optimization). SCF converged in 8 cycles. **HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.631 eV** (Koopmans orbital gap, not an excitation energy). HOMO = −7.047 eV, LUMO = −0.416 eV. The near-degeneracy of HOMO and LUMO±1 reflects benzene's symmetric π-system. All integrity checks passed; result is trustworthy. Command: `cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/benzene/benzene.xyz`.
